label: squad
action: Triage: analyze issue, assign squad:{member} label

label: squad:apiopslead
action: Pick up issue — architecture or scope decision

label: squad:apimexpert
action: Pick up issue — APIM REST API work

label: squad:apicexpert
action: Pick up issue — APIC REST API work

label: squad:typescriptdev
action: Pick up issue — TypeScript types or build

label: squad:nodejsdev
action: Pick up issue — CLI wiring, packaging, init

label: squad:testengineer
action: Pick up issue — tests or coverage

label: squad:opensourceexpert
action: Pick up issue — license or OSS compliance

label: squad:codereviewer
action: Pick up issue — code review or standards enforcement

label: squad:azdoexpert
action: Pick up issue — Azure DevOps pipelines or CLI

label: squad:githubexpert
action: Pick up issue — GitHub Actions or CLI

label: squad:docwriter
action: Pick up issue — documentation or diagrams

label: squad:securityexpert
action: Pick up issue — security, supply-chain, threat modeling
